description_long: This is a small, cylindrical bottle with a slightly tapered neck and a black screw cap. The body of the bottle features a two-tone design, with the lower portion being dark and the upper portion a lighter, metallic or plastic finish. The bottle appears to be made of either plastic or metal, with a smooth, hard surface and a glossy sheen. There are no visible handles or additional attachments, and the bottle stands upright on a flat base. The exterior is clean and free from visible damage or deformation. There is a label or branding area on the lower part of the bottle, but the details are not clearly legible.
description: A small, two-tone bottle with a black screw cap and a glossy, smooth surface. The lower part is dark, while the upper part is lighter and metallic or plastic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's black cap and a clear division between the dark lower and lighter upper body, with a visible label area.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the diagonal transition between the dark and light areas, with the cap and body contours visible.
description_view_2: Another side view, showing more of the lighter upper body and less of the dark lower section, with the cap still prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view displays mostly the lighter upper body and the cap, with minimal label or branding visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: There is a dark label area on the lower part of the bottle, but no clear text or branding is legible.
